segments.text: Welcome to the RestoreAssist Setup Wizard. This five-step process activates your workspace.
Step one, Business Profile. Confirm your business name and A B N, and upload your company logo.
Step two, A I Hydration. Industry defaults load automatically — S500 water-damage standards, W H S checklists, and report templates.
Step three, Integrations. Connect your accounting software — Xero, MYOB, or QuickBooks — and job tools like ServiceM8.
Step four, Health Check. We verify twelve capabilities, including email, storage, A I models, and compliance engines.
Step five, Activate. One tap and your workspace goes live. Your dashboard is ready.
